description: External reference repos, cloned into ./external/ by pull-references.sh (pnpm refs:pull). Read-only inspiration, not part of the Looka build.

repos.name: sample-techshop
repos.why: Official WebSpatial e-commerce demo — reference for SDK usage and app structure.

repos.name: webspatial_openclaw_command_center
repos.why: Basically our idea, pre-built: spatial agent panels with per-agent chat and voice, runs in the PICO emulator.

repos.name: SensAI-PICO-Kits
repos.why: Collection of PICO starter kits (voice, world model, and more).
